sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, convertCharset('hello', 'utf-8', 'utf-16le'));
UPDATE test_table SET name = convertCharset('world', 'utf-8', 'utf-16le') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT javaHashUTF16LE(convertCharset(name, 'utf-8', 'utf-16le')) AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE javaHashUTF16LE(convertCharset(name, 'utf-8', 'utf-16le')) > 0;
